user.title: Set up Notification Dispatcher
user.description: Create the dispatcher. Add people from the integration options afterwards.

add_person.title: Add person
add_person.description: Choose a Home Assistant person and then select one or more existing notify targets. If a target is not listed, you can still enter it manually. The all/alle target is built in and cannot be deleted.

edit_details.title: Edit person
edit_details.description: Choose a Home Assistant person and then select one or more existing notify targets. If a target is not listed, you can still enter it manually. The all/alle target is built in and cannot be deleted.

add_group.title: Add group
add_group.description: The all/alle target always exists. There is also a built-in Fallback group for rerouted notifications. Use groups for additional reusable recipient sets such as Family or Parents.

manage_fallback.title: Manage fallback group
manage_fallback.description: The fallback group is built in and cannot be deleted. Choose the people who should receive notifications when originally selected recipients are skipped because of schedule, quiet hours, or home checks.

manage_fallback_empty.title: Manage fallback group
manage_fallback_empty.description: Add at least one person first. Then come back here to choose fallback people.

edit_group_details.title: Edit group
edit_group_details.description: Change this group. all/alle remains built in. The Fallback group is built in and cannot be removed.

error.missing_notify_target: Add at least one notify target.
error.duplicate_person: This person is already configured in the dispatcher.
error.missing_group_members: Choose at least one person for the group.
error.reserved_group_name: all/alle and fallback are built in and cannot be used as group names.
error.save_failed: The person could not be saved. Details are available in the Home Assistant log.

send.name: Send notification
send.description: Dispatch a notification to configured dispatcher people according to their rules.

type.name: Type
type.description: Delivery type. Critical bypasses schedule, DND, and home checks.

target.name: Recipients
target.description: Select one or more configured dispatcher recipients or groups, including "Alle" for all.
